frames.description: The scene shows a street-side shop with many plastic buckets and woven baskets on display. A yellow and blue three-wheeled vehicle is partially visible on the right.
frames.vehicles: Yellow and blue three-wheeled vehicle partially visible.
frames.pedestrians: A person is partially visible inside the shop.
frames.infrastructure: Building with shop front and overhead power lines.

frames.description: Moving forward, a large red transport truck filled with green banana leaves dominates the foreground, obscuring much of the shop behind it.
frames.pedestrians: None visible.
frames.scene_changes: Moving past the previous shop, view blocked by a large truck.

frames.description: The camera passes a two-story building featuring 'KMS TRADERS', an Indian drugs merchant. Several motorbikes are parked in front of the shop.

signs.transcription: പൂജാ സാധനങ്ങളും പച്ച മരുന്നുകളും ഇവിടെ ലഭിക്കും (Puja items and raw medicines available here)

frames.vehicles: Multiple motorbikes/scooters parked on the street.
frames.pedestrians: None visible.
frames.scene_changes: Moved further down the street to a new storefront.

frames.description: The frame captures 'B.N. FRUITS', a fruit shop with a wide variety of fruits displayed at the entrance. People are walking by or standing near the shop.
frames.vehicles: A motorbike is partially visible on the left.
frames.pedestrians: Two men are visible, one walking past and one inside the shop.
frames.scene_changes: Continuing down the street to a fruit shop.

frames.description: Moving past an old building with a tiled roof and closed blue metal shutters. A pedestrian in a hat is seen on the left.
frames.pedestrians: One person wearing a hat and light-colored shirt.
frames.infrastructure: Old street-side buildings with metal and tiled roofs.

frames.description: The view is partially blocked by a blue structure covered in tarpaulin. A utility pole with markings is in the foreground.
frames.pedestrians: None visible.
frames.infrastructure: Utility pole and buildings with traditional roofs.
frames.scene_changes: Moving along the roadside, past a snack shop.

frames.description: The camera shows 'A.C. VASUDEVAN & SON', a coir merchant shop. Coir mats and ropes are displayed in the shop.

signs.transcription: BMS പാലക്കാട് മേഖലാ ഓഫീസ് (BMS Palakkad Regional Office)
Wholesale Dealer Best Quality in Low Price

frames.pedestrians: A person is dimly visible inside the shop.
frames.infrastructure: A shop within a yellow painted building.

frames.description: The view shifts down a narrow alleyway lined with buildings. Several motorbikes are parked along the left wall, and a white truck is seen in the distance.
frames.vehicles: Parked motorbikes and a white truck in the distance.
frames.pedestrians: None visible.
frames.infrastructure: Narrow paved alley with old buildings.
frames.scene_changes: Entering or passing a narrow side street.

frames.description: A small flower stall sits beside 'UMA GOLD', a gold covering and fancy shop. A man is seated at the flower stall.

signs.transcription: UMA GOLD GOLD COVERING & LADIES FANCY

frames.vehicles: Part of a scooter is visible at the bottom.
frames.pedestrians: A man is sitting in the flower stall.
frames.scene_changes: Moving past another set of shops.

frames.description: The camera passes 'UMA GIFT HOUSE' and a sweet shop. A woman in a saree and mask walks across the scene.
frames.pedestrians: A woman walking and a man sitting on the left.

frames.description: A close view of the interior and storefront of a shop selling dates and sweets. Glass counters are filled with traditional sweets.
frames.pedestrians: A person is inside the shop behind the counter.
frames.infrastructure: Sweet shop interior with shelves and glass displays.

frames.description: A glass display window showing various cosmetics and perfume bottles. Large advertisements for 'FOGG' and 'DISH GOLD' are visible.
frames.pedestrians: None visible.

frames.description: The camera moves past 'P.M. FLOWERS', where a man is standing at the entrance. The shop features various flower garlands.

signs.transcription: അരളി, താമര, പനിനീർ പൂക്കൾ... (Oleander, Lotus, Rose flowers...)

frames.pedestrians: A man in a red shirt standing in the shop.

frames.description: An ornate entrance to a temple is shown, featuring golden statues and a carved wooden door behind a decorative metal arch.
frames.pedestrians: None visible.
frames.infrastructure: Temple entrance with stone walls and a red roof.

frames.description: Moving along the side wall of the temple complex. A large bell is visible beneath the roof structure.
frames.pedestrians: None visible.

frames.description: The temple wall ends, revealing a red metal fence and trees in the background. A motorbike mirror is visible at the bottom.
frames.pedestrians: None visible.

frames.description: The camera moves past a dark corrugated metal fence. Part of a blue and black auto-rickshaw is visible on the left.
frames.pedestrians: None visible.

frames.description: Continuing along the dark metal fence under a clear sky. A man's head is partially visible at the bottom of the frame.
frames.pedestrians: A man's head is visible.
frames.infrastructure: Metal fence and lush green trees.

frames.description: Passing a shop with a sign for 'GUBI REXINE', selling upholstery and furnishing fabrics.

signs.transcription: GUBI REXINE Upholstery Materials & Furnishing Fabric

frames.pedestrians: None visible.
frames.infrastructure: Building with tiled roof and shop front.

frames.description: The camera passes 'THILAKAM PHARMA', a chemists and druggists shop. A man is entering the shop.
frames.pedestrians: A man in a green/grey shirt entering the pharmacy.

frames.description: Next to the pharmacy is 'CN BANANA MERCHANT', with bunches of bananas hanging inside the shop.
frames.pedestrians: A man is sitting inside the shop.
frames.infrastructure: Shop with a metal shutter and signage.

frames.description: The camera passes 'DAS TEA SHOP', a small establishment in Melamuri.
frames.vehicles: Part of a bicycle is visible.
frames.pedestrians: A man sitting inside the shop.
frames.scene_changes: Moving further along the commercial street.

frames.description: Passing by buildings with closed metal shutters.
frames.pedestrians: None visible.
frames.infrastructure: Commercial buildings with shutters and traditional roofs.

frames.description: The camera shows 'ANAND FLOUR MILL', with lists of ground items like chili, coriander, and turmeric.
frames.pedestrians: People are visible inside the shop.

frames.description: Next is 'INDRAN', a shop with numerous bottled products, likely oils or juices, on display outside.
frames.pedestrians: A person with back to the camera.
frames.infrastructure: Shopfront with various goods on display.

frames.description: A yellow building with a 'Shop for Rent' sign hanging from its overhang. Two motorbikes are parked in front.
frames.pedestrians: A man is sitting at a desk in the adjacent shop.

frames.description: The camera moves past a bright pink building with a closed shutter and a spiral staircase visible behind it.
frames.pedestrians: None visible.
frames.infrastructure: Pink building and external spiral staircase.

frames.description: Passing a general store where various garments and bags are hanging outside.
frames.pedestrians: A person is visible inside the store.

frames.description: Passing a shop with a large 'AVT PREMIUM' tea advertisement. The shop is stocked with large bags of grains.

signs.transcription: ഏറ്റവും കടുപ്പമുള്ള ചായ. സ്ഥിരമായി. (Strongest tea. Always.)

frames.pedestrians: None visible.

frames.description: The final frame shows 'SKM COCONUT POINT' and 'Sri Mookambika Lottery Agency' side-by-side.

signs.transcription: ശ്രീ മൂകാംബിക ലോട്ടറി ഏജൻസി (Sri Mookambika Lottery Agency)

frames.pedestrians: A man with a red helmet in the foreground.
